name: Seafood Marinade
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Fish or seafood (shrimp, Scallops, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow baking dish, pour marinade over fish.
2. Arrange the fish in the dish.
3. Pour marinade over fish.
4. Marinate in refrigerator at least 2 hours, turning occasionally.
5. Broil or grill, basting with marinade occasionally.
6. Pierce fish on both sides with fork.
7. Serves 6 to 8.
